old_column.content: Chakra UI exports 8 components for rendering menus:

new_column.content: Chakra UI exports 8 components for rendering menus:

old_column.content: - `Menu`: The wrapper component provides context, state, and focus management.

new_column.content: - `Menu`: The wrapper component provides context, state, and focus management.

old_column.content: - `MenuList`: The wrapper for the menu items. Must be a direct child of `Menu`.

new_column.content: - `MenuList`: The wrapper for the menu items. Must be a direct child of `Menu`.

old_column.content: - `MenuButton`: The trigger for the menu list. Must be a direct child of `Menu`.

new_column.content: - `MenuButton`: The trigger for the menu list. Must be a direct child of `Menu`.

old_column.content: - `MenuItem`: The trigger that handles menu selection. Must be a direct child of

new_column.content: - `MenuItem`: The trigger that handles menu selection. Must be a direct child of

old_column.content: - `MenuGroup`: A wrapper to group related menu items.

new_column.content: - `MenuGroup`: A wrapper to group related menu items.

old_column.content: - `MenuDivider`: A visual separator for menu items and groups.

new_column.content: - `MenuDivider`: A visual separator for menu items and groups.

old_column.content: - `MenuOptionGroup`: A wrapper for checkable menu items (radio and checkbox).

new_column.content: - `MenuOptionGroup`: A wrapper for checkable menu items (radio and checkbox).

old_column.content: - `MenuItemOption`: The checkable menu item, to be used with `MenuOptionGroup`.

new_column.content: - `MenuItemOption`: The checkable menu item, to be used with `MenuOptionGroup`.

old_column.content: | `Enter` or `Space` | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and places focus on the first menu item.                                               |

new_column.content: | `Enter` or `Space` | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and places focus on the first menu item.                                               |

old_column.content: | `ArrowDown`        | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and moves focus to the first menu item.                                                |

new_column.content: | `ArrowDown`        | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and moves focus to the first menu item.                                                |

old_column.content: | `ArrowUp`          | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and moves focus to the last menu item.                                                 |

new_column.content: | `ArrowUp`          | When `MenuButton` receives focus, opens the menu and moves focus to the last menu item.                                                 |

old_column.content: | `Escape`           | When the menu is open, closes the menu and sets focus to the `MenuButton`.                                                              |

new_column.content: | `Escape`           | When the menu is open, closes the menu and sets focus to the `MenuButton`.                                                              |

old_column.content: | `Home`             | When the menu is open, moves focus to the first item.                                                                                   |

new_column.content: | `Home`             | When the menu is open, moves focus to the first item.                                                                                   |

old_column.content: | `End`              | When the menu is open, moves focus to the last item.                                                                                    |

new_column.content: | `End`              | When the menu is open, moves focus to the last item.                                                                                    |

old_column.content: | `A-Z` or `a-z`     | When the menu is open, moves focus to the next menu item with a label that starts with the typed character if such an menu item exists. |

new_column.content: | `A-Z` or `a-z`     | When the menu is open, moves focus to the next menu item with a label that starts with the typed character if such an menu item exists. |

new_column.content: - When the menu is displayed, `aria-expanded` is set to `true`.

new_column.content: - `aria-controls` is set to the `id` of the `MenuList`.
